excerpt: Get the accessibility checklist — Want the public-building vending accessibility checklist — ADA dimensions, VPAT verification, and annual audit?

Get the accessibility checklist — Want the student vending accessibility checklist (ADA + audio + nutrition + placement + 504 alignment)?
